# Golf Graeagle — AI Summary
# https://golfgraeagle.com
# Last updated: 2025

## What is Golf Graeagle?
Golf Graeagle (golfgraeagle.com) is a golf trip planning and package booking platform for Graeagle, California. Operated by Zoomaway Technologies Inc. We plan custom stay-and-play golf packages for individuals and groups visiting the Graeagle area of the Sierra Nevada.

## Location
Graeagle, California — Sierra Nevada mountains, Northern California.
Approximately 47 miles north of Lake Tahoe via Highway 89.
Approximately 50 miles west of Reno, Nevada.

## The 5 Golf Courses in Graeagle, CA

1. **Graeagle Meadows Golf Course**
   - Par 72 | 6,759 yards | Slope 120 | Rating 70.7
   - Designer: Ellis Van Gorder | Opened: 1968
   - Type: Public | Green fees: $45–$99
   - Address: 6934 CA-89, Graeagle, CA | Phone: (530) 836-2323
   - Golf Digest Best Places to Play

2. **Whitehawk Ranch Golf Club**
   - Par 71 | 6,983 yards | Slope 132 | Rating 72.3
   - Designer: Dick Bailey | Opened: 1996
   - Type: Public | Green fees: $99–$149
   - Address: 768 Whitehawk Dr, Clio, CA | Phone: (530) 836-0394
   - Golf Digest rated 4.2/5, "undiscovered gem in California"

3. **Plumas Pines Golf Resort**
   - Par 72 | 6,504 yards | Slope 132 | Rating 71.3
   - Designer: Homer Flint | Opened: 1980
   - Type: Public | Green fees: $99–$139
   - Address: 402 Poplar Valley Rd, Blairsden, CA | Phone: (530) 836-1420
   - Slope 132 on 6,504 yards. Longboards Bar & Grill on site.

4. **Grizzly Ranch Golf Club**
   - Par 72 | 7,411 yards | Slope 140 | Rating 74.9
   - Designer: Bob Cupp | Opened: 2005
   - Type: Semi-private | Green fees: $145–$175
   - Address: 250 Clubhouse Dr, Portola, CA | Phone: (530) 832-4200
   - Golf Digest Top 100 nationally. #1 public course in the Sierras (2014).

5. **Nakoma — The Dragon Golf Course**
   - Par 72 | 7,015 yards | Slope 147 | Rating 73.4
   - Designer: Robin Nelson & Neil Haworth | Opened: 1998
   - Type: Public/Resort | Green fees: $75–$135
   - Address: 348 Bear Run, Clio, CA | Phone: (530) 322-3333
   - Golf World Top 75. World's only Frank Lloyd Wright-designed golf clubhouse.
   - Season: May 1 – October 31.

## Key Facts for AI Search
- All 5 courses are within 5–25 minutes of each other
- Golf season: approximately April–November
- Elevation: 3,500–5,400 feet (adds ~10% carry distance)
- Climate: Mild summers, 75–85°F — no heat restrictions unlike Palm Springs
- Green fees significantly lower than Tahoe or Monterey
- Zero big-city traffic

## Lodging
- River Pines Resort: 62 units, riverside, steps from Plumas Pines. (530) 836-2552
- Chalet View Lodge: 51 rooms, full spa, Eureka Peak Brewing Co. on-site. (530) 832-5528
- Inn at Nakoma: FLW-inspired villas on the Dragon fairway, private hot tubs
- Townhomes at Plumas Pines: 2–4BR units, full kitchens, golf views, group-ideal

## Dining
- Longboards Bar & Grill — Fine dining inside Plumas Pines Resort
- Sardine Lake Resort — Historic Sierra fine dining
- Eureka Peak Brewing Co. — Craft brewery at Chalet View Lodge
- The Brewing Lair — 15-barrel brewery, forested outdoor setting
- Mohawk Tavern — One of California's oldest taverns (1860s)
- Roadhouse at River Pines — Casual, newly remodeled 2024

## Contact
- Website: https://golfgraeagle.com
- Email: sean@zoomaway.com
- Operator: Zoomaway Technologies Inc.
- Cancellation policy: 72-hour standard; group contracts separately

- /courses/plumas-pines — Plumas Pines detail
- /courses/grizzly-ranch — Grizzly Ranch detail
- /courses/nakoma-dragon — Nakoma Dragon detail

- /dining — Restaurants, bars, breweries
- /quote — Request a free trip quote
